scope.name: EvidenceSnapshot
scope.purpose: Define the canonical normalized evidence structure consumed by deterministic PREO audit checks. Provider-specific API variance is isolated in adapter layers; all validator logic consumes only a canonical EvidenceSnapshot.

stages.name: raw_provider_response
stages.description: Raw API response from the provider. Provider-specific field names, ordering, and formats may be present.

stages.name: provider_adapter
stages.description: Adapter layer that translates raw provider response into canonical EvidenceSnapshot fields. All provider-specific variance must be resolved here.

stages.name: canonical_evidence_snapshot
stages.description: Normalized EvidenceSnapshot conforming to schemas/evidence-snapshot.schema.json. The snapshot_hash is computed at this stage.

stages.name: deterministic_audit_checks
stages.description: Audit logic that consumes only the canonical EvidenceSnapshot. No provider-specific fields or ordering dependencies are permitted at this stage.

stages.name: preo_valid_or_preo_invalid
stages.description: Final PREO_VALID or PREO_INVALID transition result. Must be reproducible from the EvidenceSnapshot alone.

required_checks_alias_model.purpose: Each required_status_check must be resolved to its allowed emitted GitHub Actions job check-run names via explicit alias mappings. String-matching heuristics are forbidden.

resolution_rules.condition: A required_status_check has no entry in the alias map.
A required_status_check maps to more than one candidate that could match the same emitted check.
A required_status_check has an alias map entry but no emitted check with that name appears in emitted_checks for the exact head_sha.
Resolver uses partial string match, regex, or any non-explicit approach to associate required checks with emitted checks.

stale_review_detection.rule: A review is stale if review.commit_sha does not equal anchor.head_sha.

governance_drift_detection.rule: If the branch_protection configuration in the snapshot differs from the declared governance policy, governance drift is present.
